laptops.name: UNIBAY Phantom 17
laptops.description: The ultimate 17.3" gaming laptop with desktop-class performance. Featuring the latest NVIDIA RTX graphics, Intel Core i9 processor, and a stunning 240Hz display with Mini-LED technology.

laptops.name: UNIBAY Phantom 15
laptops.description: The perfect balance of performance and portability. A 15.6" powerhouse that delivers exceptional gaming performance in a sleek, travel-friendly design.

laptops.name: UNIBAY Spectre 16
laptops.description: A creator's dream machine. The 16" 4K OLED display with 100% DCI-P3 coverage brings your content to life with stunning accuracy and vibrant colors.

laptops.name: UNIBAY Stealth 14
laptops.description: Don't let its slim profile fool you. The Stealth 14 packs serious gaming performance into an ultraportable form factor that looks professional anywhere.

desktops.name: UNIBAY Titan Pro
desktops.description: The flagship desktop for those who demand the absolute best. Featuring custom liquid cooling, premium components, and a stunning tempered glass chassis.

desktops.name: UNIBAY Vortex
desktops.description: The perfect gaming desktop that balances performance and value. Expertly configured for 1440p and 4K gaming with premium components.

desktops.name: UNIBAY Creator Station
desktops.description: A workstation built for creative professionals. Optimized for video editing, 3D rendering, and demanding creative workflows.

desktops.name: UNIBAY Compact Fury
desktops.description: Don't let the small size fool you. This compact powerhouse delivers full gaming performance in a space-saving ITX form factor.

accessories.name: UNIBAY Vision 32 4K
accessories.description: Colour-calibrated 32-inch 4K gaming and creator display with DisplayHDR and wide gamut coverage.

accessories.name: UNIBAY Tactile Pro
accessories.description: Hot-swappable mechanical keyboard tuned for typing and competitive play with per-key lighting.

accessories.name: UNIBAY Apex Mouse
accessories.description: Ultra-light wireless esports mouse with optical switches and long battery life.
